languages.text: "...добывать прометий. Строить мануфакторумы. Чинить корабли. Убивать. Все, что вам будет угодно". {n}Стальные нотки звенят в голосе Старейшины.{/n}

languages.text: "...extract and refine promethium. Build manufactories. Repair ships. Kill. Do whatever you say." {n}The elder's words ring with tempered steel.{/n}

languages.text: "...Promethium gewinnen und veredeln. Manufakturen bauen. Schiffe reparieren. Töten. Tu, was immer du sagst." {n}Die Worte des Ältesten klingen wie gehärteter Stahl.{/n}
languages.original_text: "...extract and refine promethium. Build manufactories. Repair ships. Kill. Do whatever you say." {n}The elder's words ring with tempered steel.{/n}

languages.text: "...extraire et raffiner le prométhium. Construire des usines. Réparer des navires. Tuer. Faites ce que vous voulez." {n}Les mots de l'aîné sonnent comme de l'acier trempé.{/n}
languages.original_text: "...extract and refine promethium. Build manufactories. Repair ships. Kill. Do whatever you say." {n}The elder's words ring with tempered steel.{/n}

languages.text: "......提取和提炼钷。建造工厂。修理船只。杀人你说什么就做什么。"{n}长老的话掷地有声。{/n}
languages.original_text: "...extract and refine promethium. Build manufactories. Repair ships. Kill. Do whatever you say." {n}The elder's words ring with tempered steel.{/n}

languages.text: "...extraer y refinar prometio. Construir fábricas. Reparar naves. Matar. Haced lo que digáis". {n}Las palabras del anciano resuenan con acero templado.{/n}
languages.original_text: "...extract and refine promethium. Build manufactories. Repair ships. Kill. Do whatever you say." {n}The elder's words ring with tempered steel.{/n}

languages.text: "...プロメチウムの抽出と精製。製造所の建設。船を修理する。殺す。何でも言うとおりにしろ"{n}長老の言葉は鋼鉄のように響く。{/n}
languages.original_text: "...extract and refine promethium. Build manufactories. Repair ships. Kill. Do whatever you say." {n}The elder's words ring with tempered steel.{/n}

languages.text: "...prometyumu çıkarın ve rafine edin. Fabrikalar inşa edin. Gemileri onarın. Öldürün. Sen ne dersen onu yap." {n}İhtiyarın sözleri sertleştirilmiş çelikle çınlıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "...extract and refine promethium. Build manufactories. Repair ships. Kill. Do whatever you say." {n}The elder's words ring with tempered steel.{/n}
